title: Manage complex customer requirements in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage complex customer requirements in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm customer requirements

pcs.text: Use collaborative techniques, including active listening and questioning, to elicit, clarify and confirm customer requirements1.2 Document customer requirements clearly and legibly according to workplace procedures and organisational legal requirements1.3 Obtain customer acknowledgement and confirmation of the documented requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use collaborative techniques, including active listening and questioning, to elicit, clarify and confirm customer requirements1.2 Document customer requirements clearly and legibly according to workplace procedures and organisational legal requirements1.3 Obtain customer acknowledgement and confirmation of the documented requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use collaborative techniques, including active listening and questioning, to elicit, clarify and confirm customer requirements1.2 Document customer requirements clearly and legibly according to workplace procedures and organisational legal requirements1.3 Obtain customer acknowledgement and confirmation of the documented requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm customer requirements

elements.title: Advise customer of available options

pcs.text: Generate viable options in response to customer needs and workplace legal requirements according to workplace procedures2.2 Research further information as required to confirm or clarify options2.3 Explain and discuss options with customer to assist informed decision making2.4 Provide supporting information as required to assist customer understanding 2.5 Communicate sales or service conditions verbally or through written correspondence according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Generate viable options in response to customer needs and workplace legal requirements according to workplace procedures2.2 Research further information as required to confirm or clarify options2.3 Explain and discuss options with customer to assist informed decision making2.4 Provide supporting information as required to assist customer understanding 2.5 Communicate sales or service conditions verbally or through written correspondence according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Generate viable options in response to customer needs and workplace legal requirements according to workplace procedures2.2 Research further information as required to confirm or clarify options2.3 Explain and discuss options with customer to assist informed decision making2.4 Provide supporting information as required to assist customer understanding 2.5 Communicate sales or service conditions verbally or through written correspondence according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Advise customer of available options

elements.title: Agree action plan with customer

pcs.text: Detail and document customer’s preferred option in action plan3.2 Gain customer commitment to agreed action plan according to workplace procedures3.3 Provide assistance in completing relevant documentation to customers as required3.4 Seek customer feedback on services provided
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Detail and document customer’s preferred option in action plan3.2 Gain customer commitment to agreed action plan according to workplace procedures3.3 Provide assistance in completing relevant documentation to customers as required3.4 Seek customer feedback on services provided?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Detail and document customer’s preferred option in action plan3.2 Gain customer commitment to agreed action plan according to workplace procedures3.3 Provide assistance in completing relevant documentation to customers as required3.4 Seek customer feedback on services provided.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Agree action plan with customer

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
